action.reasoning: Observation: 6 epochs trained, dev EER=0 (saturated on dev which is in-domain). Previous 3-epoch model gave test EER=0.0956. Now have a longer-trained model with stronger augmentation. Need to evaluate to see if more training helps. Analysis: Dev is saturated so dev EER doesn't help select. Submit eval to check test performance. Decision: Submit eval now.
